generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance BuildingControlSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "The building control system (BCS) integrates HVAC, lighting, and automation systems modeled within the BIM environment for real-time actuation and control of building infrastructure."
]

instance LightingControlModule : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Lighting control module with tenant-specific ID integration for adaptive lighting management within the BIM-based building infrastructure."
]

instance HVACControlSystem : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "HVAC control system with real-time temperature and occupancy-based control logic, synchronized with BIM metadata for adaptive building operation."
]

instance OccupancyActuator : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Actuator for occupancy-based control of building systems (e.g., HVAC, lighting) triggered via sensor feedback and BIM-embedded tenant configurations."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensorNetwork : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor network embedded in BIM model capturing real-time occupancy data across building zones for adaptive building management."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyData
]

instance EnergyConsumptionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Energy consumption sensor network integrated with BIM to monitor power usage by building systems and tenant activities."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyData
]

instance EnvironmentalParameterSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor network capturing environmental parameters (temperature, humidity, CO₂) within the BIM-based building infrastructure."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalData
]

instance BIMEnrichedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "BIM-embedded sensors with device metadata (tenant IDs, endpoint addresses) extracted for runtime interface generation via model-driven pipeline."
    DTDFVocab:producedData BIMMetadata
]

instance RealTimeDataAcquisitionSystem : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "System for automated data acquisition and normalization of real-time operational data from BIM-embedded sensors via Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware."
    DTDFVocab:producedData RuntimeConfigurations
]

// C4: Data Transmission
instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancySensorNetwork
]

instance EnergyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyConsumptionSensor
]

instance EnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalParameterSensor
]

instance BIMMetadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData BIMEnrichedSensor
]

instance RuntimeConfigurations : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData RealTimeDataAcquisitionSystem
]

// C5: Data Models
instance BIMModelWithDeviceMetadata : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM model enriched with device metadata (sensor/actuator configurations, control logic) embedded directly into building elements for runtime interface generation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMPlatformTools
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringFramework
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoMiddleware
]

instance RuntimeInterfaceArtifacts : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structured runtime artifacts generated via model-to-model transformations from BIM models, containing device IDs, endpoint addresses, and control schemas."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoConfigurator
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CustomServiceIntegration
]

instance IFCCOBieStandardizedData : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structured data representations following IFC and COBie standards for interoperability with AECO systems."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngineVisualization
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

// C6: Enablers
instance ModelDrivenEngineeringFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) framework automating extraction of domain semantics from BIM models and generation of runtime interfaces."
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMModelWithDeviceMetadata
    DTDFVocab:enables RuntimeInterfaceArtifacts
]

instance EclipseHonoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono middleware enabling real-time bidirectional data exchange between physical building components and digital twin via standardized protocols."
    DTDFVocab:enables OccupancyData
    DTDFVocab:enables EnergyData
    DTDFVocab:enables EnvironmentalData
    DTDFVocab:enables RuntimeConfigurations
]

instance DittoConfigurator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Ditto Configurator automating extraction of runtime artifacts (service configurations, data schemas) from BIM models for DT deployment."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance UnrealEngineVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 platform providing immersive 3D visualization for interactive DT monitoring and simulation."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveSimulationService
]

instance BIMPlatformTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Generic BIM platforms (e.g., Revit, ArchiCAD) used for device modeling, configuration, and metadata enrichment of building infrastructure."
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMEnrichedSensor
    DTDFVocab:enables LightingControlModule
    DTDFVocab:enables HVACControlSystem
]

// C7: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring and visualization service using Unreal Engine for immersive 3D interaction with building's digital representation."
    DTDFVocab:provides OccupantComfortInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides EnvironmentalData
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service employing reinforcement learning (e.g., BOREALIS) for energy optimization, occupant comfort prediction, and operational cost reduction."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalCostReductionInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides AdaptiveControlAction
]

instance InteractiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive simulation service enabling performance analysis and decision support across building's life cycle (design, operation, refurbishment)."
    DTDFVocab:provides RefurbishmentPlanningInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterUpdateAction
]

instance CustomServiceIntegration : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Standardized extension points allowing DT Engineers to deploy domain-specific plugins (e.g., IoT analytics, AI-driven control strategies)."
    DTDFVocab:provides CustomServiceIntegration
]

// C8: Insights/Actions
instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for energy efficiency improvements through adaptive control strategies and real-time optimization algorithms."
]

instance OccupantComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time occupant comfort assessments based on environmental parameters and adaptive building responses."
]

instance OperationalCostReductionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Cost-saving insights derived from predictive analytics and adaptive building management strategies."
]

instance RefurbishmentPlanningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Decision support for refurbishment planning using interactive simulations and historical operational data."
]

instance AdaptiveControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of control strategies based on real-time DT feedback and predictive analytics."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic parameter updates to building control systems derived from DT insights and operational data."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The **virtual-to-physical interaction** is enabled through **service-oriented architecture** with standardized extension points, allowing the DT to generate control signals and commands for physical actuators. The framework integrates with **Unreal Engine** for visualization and **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** for real-time actuation, ensuring seamless feedback loops between the digital and physical worlds. Control logic is embedded directly into BIM models by **Building Control Engineers**, enabling automated commissioning and adaptive adjustments."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The **twinning time scale** is **real-time**, with synchronization between the physical and virtual twins occurring at **sub-second intervals** for critical operational data (e.g., sensor readings, control commands). The framework supports **low-latency bidirectional communication** via **Eclipse Hono** and **Ditto**, ensuring that the DT remains dynamically aligned with the physical building’s operational state. The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** is used to evaluate the fidelity of this synchronization."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The **DT constellation** is structured as a **service-oriented ecosystem** with:
  - A **centralized DT framework** acting as the orchestrator, integrating BIM models, middleware, and visualization tools.
  - **Modular components** (e.g., lighting control modules, energy optimization services) deployed via standardized extension points.
  - **Hierarchical relationships** between individual devices (e.g., sensors) and higher-level services (e.g., adaptive lighting systems), ensuring scalability and interoperability across the entire infrastructure."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The **life-cycle stages** covered by the DT span:
  1. **Design phase**: BIM models are enriched with device metadata and control logic by **Building Control Engineers**.
  2. **Construction phase**: Automated validation ensures compliance with BIM standards and real-time data integration readiness.
  3. **Operation phase**: The DT provides real-time monitoring, predictive analytics, and adaptive control (e.g., via **BOREALIS**’ reinforcement learning) to optimize energy efficiency and occupant comfort.
  4. **Refurbishment phase**: The DT supports dynamic updates and service evolution via standardized extension points, ensuring longevity and adaptability."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The **fidelity and validity considerations** are addressed through:
  - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** to evaluate alignment between the DT and its physical counterpart.
  - **Model validation** to ensure BIM data consistency and completeness before deployment.
  - **Automated commissioning** to verify real-time data synchronization and control logic execution.
  - **Uncertainty management** via structured data flows and middleware (e.g., **Eclipse Hono/Ditto**), ensuring robustness against sensor drift or network latency."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs **Eclipse Hono** and **Ditto** for real-time data exchange, leveraging standardized protocols for bidirectional communication. The technical connection ensures low-latency synchronization between physical assets and the DT, with no additional unsupported protocols (e.g., MQTT, WebSockets) mentioned."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed via a **modular, service-oriented architecture** with standardized extension points. The framework supports **runtime configuration management**, enabling adjustments to services (e.g., control logic) without redeployment. Unreal Engine is used for visualization, but deployment specifics (e.g., cloud/edge computing) are not detailed."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT integrates horizontally with **AECO-specific systems and standards** (e.g., BIM) and **middleware platforms** (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) for interoperability. While not explicitly mentioning IFC/COBie, the framework emphasizes **standardized extension points** for modular service integration across heterogeneous systems."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to **AECO-specific standards** (e.g., BIM) and **model-driven engineering (MDE)** principles. Standardized extension points enable interoperability with existing AECO tools, though no explicit mention of IFC/COBie is provided."
]
